trait.name: color
trait.variability: pink when young dark brown old

trait.name: shape
trait.variability: bulbous base with ring and volva

trait.name: color
trait.variability: white with ring and scaly base

trait.name: surface
trait.variability: smooth with ring and warts at base

trait.name: surface
trait.variability: fibrous woolly with ring and volva

trait.name: color
trait.variability: white to pink to black with age

trait.name: attachment
trait.variability: smooth or faint ridges on outside

trait.name: pattern
trait.variability: dense groups often hard to spot

trait.name: margin
trait.variability: margin attached to sides of stem

trait.name: color
trait.variability: pure white edible when fully white inside

trait.name: shape
trait.variability: very short lateral stem or absent

trait.name: smell
trait.variability: no smell but intensely bitter taste
